title: oxalis corniculata var. preissiana
intro: Oxalis corniculata var. preissiana, also known as Wood Sorrel, is a perennial plant that belongs to the Oxalidaceae family. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its medicinal properties, which include its ability to treat urinary tract issues, such as kidney stones and bladder problems, due to its diuretic and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Oxalis corniculata var. preissiana include its potential to reduce inflammation, act as an antioxidant, and support immune function. In herbal preparations, it is often used as a tea, decoction, or tincture, and can be combined with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
